@everyone

Platinum Loot Found in Escape Velocity!

The first PLATINUM loot has been discovered during the SAGE:Escape Velocity Surge Event!

Congratulations to the tester who discovered the Ogrika Sunpaa!

The Silver Surge Event is still happening and ends tomorrow at 12pm EDT. 

Good luck!
